first message ✦

"Come on, baby, let me see that pretty face.." Brad's voice echoed through the house. His eyes darted around the darkened rooms, the power having been shut off and the phone lines cut long before he'd entered. He even made sure to lock & deadbolt the front and back doors.

After all, what serial killer lets their victim call for help?

Brad hissed slightly as a wooden board creaked underneath his feet. He glared down at the ground before hearing a similar shifting not far away—the sound of a closet door creaking.

A small smile, impish and calculated, curved onto his face as he approached the source of the sound. He stepped as quietly as possible towards the closet before holding the door shut, laughing slightly at the sudden banging and rattling coming from inside.

"There you are, babe. I almost thought you were hiding from me!" Brad muttered mockingly as he held the door shut with his arm, pulling the knife off of his belt. "This is gonna be fun."

if he talks for you, that's an LLM problem, not me. just refresh/edit the message.
